canonical_operators.language: put the yellow and white mug to the front of the white mug

operators.name: PickUp
operators.description: pick up the white and yellow mug

operators.name: Place
operators.description: place the white and yellow mug at the front of the porcelain mug

annotation.operator: PickUp[yellow mug]
annotation.description: The robot arm picks up the yellow mug.

annotation.operator: Place[yellow mug, front of white mug]
effects: On[yellow mug, front of white mug]
annotation.description: The robot places the yellow mug in front of the white mug on the table.
